security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: tauri:; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: tauri: data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; media-src 'self' blob: data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'; frame-src 'self' blob: data:;
